only_pro_content_id.description: Identifier for a single-screen content configuration shown exclusively to pro users. When the user is a pro subscriber and this value is non-null and non-empty, the UI bypasses tabs and renders a single offer screen using this identifier. Also used as the analytics offer variant value when active.

screen_name.description: Identifier used to look up this screen configuration from remote settings. Matched against the requested screen name; falls back to a default touchpoint key if no match is found. Also used as the offer variant value for analytics tracking when pro-only content is not active.

content_id.description: Identifier for a single-screen content configuration. When this value is non-null and non-empty, the UI renders a single offer screen (no tabs) by loading the screen data associated with this identifier. When null or empty, the UI falls back to tab-based rendering using the tabs array.

tabs.description: Array of tab configurations for the tab switcher UI. Each entry defines one tab in the CycleSwitcherView. When the array contains exactly one tab, the UI renders a single screen without tabs. When it contains more than one tab, a tab switcher is displayed allowing the user to switch between different offer screens.

badge.description: Text content displayed inside a badge overlay on the tab. When non-empty, a badge view is shown on the tab in its selected state. The badge may also appear in the unselected state if show_unselected_state_badge is true. When empty, no badge is displayed.

visible.description: Flag indicating whether this tab should be visible. Defined in the API model but not currently read or acted upon in the UI rendering logic.

selected_text_color.description: Text color applied to the tab's title when it is in the selected state. Specified as a CascadeColorPackage path string. Falls back to CascadeColorPackage NegativeColors.base.default if empty or invalid.

background_color.description: Background color of the tab button when it is in the selected state. Specified as a CascadeColorPackage path string. Applied as a gradient background to the selected tab's text view. Falls back to CascadeColorPackage PositiveColors.base.default if invalid.

deselected_text_color.description: Text color applied to the tab's title when it is in the deselected state. Specified as a CascadeColorPackage path string. The addition field value is appended to this string before it is used. Falls back to CascadeColorPackage NegativeColors.base.default if the result is empty or invalid.

content_id.description: Identifier that links this tab to its corresponding screen content configuration. Used as the key in the tab-to-screen mapping and passed as the screen name when loading screen data. Also used as the tab's unique identifier for tab switch events.

show_unselected_state_badge.description: Controls whether the badge is displayed on this tab when it is in the unselected state. When true and the badge text is non-empty, the badge is shown with an unselected background style. When false or when badge is empty, the badge view is hidden on the unselected tab.

title.description: Display text shown on the tab button in the CycleSwitcherView. Rendered as the label of the tab (e.g., a billing cycle name). Defaults to an empty string if null.

gradient_type.description: Determines the background drawable used for the tab badge. When set to "plus", uses the user_plus drawable; when set to "pro", uses the user_pro drawable. Any other value or null results in no background drawable for the badge.

selected.description: Indicates whether this tab should be initially selected when the tab switcher is first rendered. The ViewModel finds the first tab with selected set to true and loads its corresponding screen content as the initial display.

addition.description: A string suffix that is concatenated to the deselected_text_color value before it is resolved as a color. Used to modify or extend the color path for the deselected tab text color.

tabs_bg_color.description: Background color of the parent tab switcher container. Specified as a CascadeColorPackage path string. Applied as a gradient background to the tab bar's parent view. Falls back to CascadeColorPackage BackgroundColors.tint2 if the value is empty or invalid.
